title: Cinematic Concept Poster
sourceTitle: Cinematic Historical Ranking Concept Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic concept poster centered on Ranking of emperors in Chinese history, using Create a cinematic concept poster centered on the theme: Ranking of emperors in Chinese history. as the dominant visual metaphor. Subject: Create a cinematic concept poster centered on the theme: Ranking of emperors in Chinese history. represents the power hierarchy of Ranking of emperors in Chinese history, supported by floating jade tablets, golden rank markers, scroll fragments, palace rooflines, and carved dragon reliefs that reinforce imperial ranking, dynasty weight, and historical authority. Scene: Epic imperial spatial atmosphere with throne architecture, floating hierarchy elements, ceremonial haze, monumental scale, and clean negative space at the edges. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Preserved cinematic historical ranking concept poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Core Visual: monumental imperial throne rising from layered bronze dynasty seals and a shadowed emperor silhouette. Style: Hyperrealistic 3D commercial CGI rendering with cinematic lighting, luxury visual language, realistic materials, volumetric light, natural reflections, shadows, depth of field, and industrial-grade aesthetics. Color Palette: Fixed imperial dark bronze, aged gold, black stone, deep red accents, warm volumetric light, and restrained historical luxury contrast. Lighting: Cinematic volumetric beam light, throne-room glow, metal reflections, atmospheric smoke, and dramatic but readable hierarchy lighting. Typography: IMPERIAL RANK appears as a sharp powerful title; POWER ACROSS DYNASTIES appears as minimal supporting copy in safe negative space. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
